title: Board UX: add lane-count badge contrast boost for quick scan
description: Improve Trello-like readability by increasing count-pill contrast in lane headers while preserving current spacing.

title: Board UX: add compact due-window legend chips beside filter selects
description: Show tiny legend chips (24h/3d/7d) near due-window filter to improve scanability and clarify meaning at a glance.

title: Board UX: add sticky board-filter shadow cue beneath top nav on scroll
description: Subtle shadow cue improves filter-toolbar depth hierarchy and keeps board controls discoverable during long-lane scroll.

title: Board UX: add subtle lane-edge fade labels for mobile scroll discoverability
description: Improve horizontal lane scanability by pairing edge-fade affordances with compact edge labels on narrow viewports.

title: Board UX: add horizontal scroll edge-fade indicators for lane container
description: Add subtle left/right edge fades on kanban scroll area so users immediately see horizontal overflow on board.

title: Board UX: add sticky lane-header shadow for horizontal scroll context
description: Improve Trello-like readability by adding subtle sticky-lane header shadow while board columns scroll horizontally.

title: Board UX: add compact active-filter diagnostics in empty-state helper
description: When board is empty due to filters, show active filter count and quick link to clear all in one tap.

title: Board UX: add compact settings header breadcrumb context for board workspace
description: Show board workspace context in settings header so users can return to board without nav scanning.

title: Board UX: add filter-empty-state count hint for quick diagnosis
description: Show compact helper explaining how many active filters are narrowing board results when no cards match.

title: Board UX: clarify saved-view helper with one-click reset hint
description: Keep board toolbar affordances explicit after active view helper rollout.

title: Navigation: add settings header return-to-board chip
description: Add a compact 'Back to board' quick-jump chip in /settings header to complete bidirectional board/settings navigation.

title: Board UX: add compact board empty-state CTA linking to /settings advanced controls
description: When board has no matching cards after filters, show one-tap CTA to clear filters or open settings advanced controls.

title: Board UX: add active saved-view helper text + clear affordance in toolbar
description: Clarify why a saved view is active and provide one-click reset to all views from the saved-views row.

title: Board UX: persist active saved-view chip state in toolbar
description: Make saved-view chips indicate current match to improve orientation on board.

title: Navigation: add compact board quick-jump between /board and /settings
description: Keep board primary while making advanced controls reachable with one tap.

title: Board UX: add saved-view chips row for common board filter combinations
description: Expose one-tap view chips near toolbar for Mobile/Priority/Assigned slices.

title: Settings: add board-to-settings advanced-controls shortcut card
description: UI strike follow-up to keep board focused while preserving quick access to advanced controls.

title: Board UX: add board-header active-filter count pill beside reset controls
description: Autonomous UI strike follow-up task

title: Board UX: tighten mobile column/card spacing and sticky toolbar wrapping under 900px
description: Autonomous UI strike follow-up task

title: Board UX: add one-tap filter reset chip cluster with active count
description: Improve discoverability of applied board constraints.
